site.subtitle_en: Creative Director | Media Professional | Storyteller and IP Builder
site.subtitle_zh: 创意策划总监 | 媒体导演 | 故事讲述与IP构建

about.title_en: Creative Director | Media Professional | Storyteller and IP Builder
about.title_zh: 创意策划总监 | 媒体人| 故事讲述与IP构建
about.bio_en: With over a decade of front-line media and large-scale event experience, I am a cross-disciplinary creative professional who serves as a large-scale event director, project manager, journalist, and editor. Specializing in Storytelling and IP development, I excel at transforming creative concepts into executable online and on-site experiences by integrating media, art, and technology to craft immersive, emotionally resonant experiences.
about.bio_zh: 拥有十余年一线媒体与大型活动工作经验，集大型活动导演、项目经理、记者、编导、于一身的跨领域创意策划者。擅长以叙事和IP构造为核心，将创意概念转化为可落地的现场体验，融合媒体、艺术与科技，打造沉浸式、有情感共鸣的线上和现场体验。拥有丰富的海内外艺术、文化、媒介领域专业人士与机构资源，具备从创意策划到全案落地的综合能力。
about.quote_en: Good ideas don't come from nowhere—they come from extensive research and groundwork, a sound way of thinking, rich industry experience, certain techniques and methods, a keen sense of generational shifts, breadth of mind, aesthetic judgment, the habit of jotting things down anytime, anywhere... and, ultimately, a moment of grace.
about.quote_zh: 好的创意并非凭空而来，而是来自：大量的资料收集与案头工作，一个好的思维方式，丰富的行业经验，一些技巧与方法，对“代际”的敏锐感知，思维的宽阔性，审美判断力，随时随地记录的习惯，……还有，一个天赋的时刻。
about.education_en:
Interactive Media Arts (MA), Tisch School of the Arts, New York University
Member of Shanghai New Art Workers Association (NAWA)

services.desc_zh: 宣传片、短视频、纪录片、展览影像

services.desc_zh: 从概念到落地的全程执行、供应商管理、品质把控

projects.title_en: Urban Festival of the Olympic Qualifier Series
projects.title_zh: 奥运会资格系列赛·上海 城市体育节

sections_zh.subtitle: 欢迎盛典
sections_zh.text: 活动现场星光熠熠，阵容包括王一博、张杰、黄明昊、刘逸云、刘雨昕、张尕怂、周洁琼等歌手与演员。演出获得第29届亚洲电视大奖最佳综艺节目奖。

sections_zh.subtitle: “有意思”非遗市集
sections_zh.text: 一场汇聚了好逛的市集、好看的表演、好炫的打卡装置、好牛的非遗传人以及好玩的游戏的非遗主题派对。

sections_zh.subtitle: 悦动巅峰派对
sections_zh.text: 中文、英文、法语和上海话歌词交织的动感融合，电子节拍、嘻哈、摇滚、民谣旋律与戏曲元素碰撞交织。

sections_zh.subtitle: 心无限·时尚之旅
sections_zh.text: 以绿色生活、可持续性和环保意识为核心价值的时尚主题秀。

sections_zh.subtitle: 炫动青春斗Show场
sections_zh.text: 霹雳舞、甩手舞、disco……一场融合了多种细分舞种的街舞年代秀battle比赛。

sections_en.subtitle: The Opening Ceremony
sections_en.text: The event featured a star-studded lineup including Wang Yibo, Jason Zhang, and more. Won Best Entertainment at the 29th Asian Television Awards.

sections_en.subtitle: A Cultural Heritage Party
sections_en.text: A cultural heritage party gathering inviting stalls, stunning performances, and dazzling installations.

sections_en.subtitle: A Music Festival
sections_en.text: A dynamic fusion of Chinese, English, French, and Shanghainese lyrics, where electronic beats, hip-hop, rock, and folk melodies collided.

sections_en.subtitle: A Fashion-themed Performance
sections_en.text: Built around green living, sustainability, and environmental consciousness.

sections_en.subtitle: A Street Dance Party
sections_en.text: A street dance battle blending breaking, waacking, disco, and more.

projects.title_zh: 上海国际电影节开、闭幕式及红毯仪式

projects.title_en: Interactive Art Installation: The Starfield of Resonance
projects.title_zh: 交互艺术装置《共鸣星域》

sections_zh.text:
【入选上海Future Lab 2025展览和获邀迪拜Prototype for Humanity2026参展】
情感化实时交互艺术装置：通过计算机视觉识别用户表情，触发实时生成的视听内容反馈。

sections_en.text:
[Selected for Future Lab 2025 Exhibition in Shanghai and Invited to Exhibit at Prototype for Humanity 2026 in Dubai]
An AI-driven project where two participants each control a drifting star on screen.

projects.title_en: Interactive Art Installation: Ode to the Night
projects.title_zh: 交互艺术装置《夜的颂歌》

sections_zh.text: 沉浸式意境空间交互装置：通过将参与者物理动作实时映射为虚拟星空的位移，创造“星空随动”的沉浸体验。作品在纽约进行了展览。

sections_en.text: Participants enter the installation space and put on interactive glasses; as they move, the stars above shimmer and follow the direction of their gaze. Exhibited in New York.

projects.title_zh: 网页交互游戏《科学的朋友》

sections_zh.text: 内容数据化与人格化推荐系统：通过构建虚构人物的多维度标签体系并实现用户匹配。

sections_en.text: A platform that helps the mad scientist find virtual friends through multi-dimensional tagging.

sections_zh.text: 在线多人拼图游戏，需要团队合作，在限定时间内完成拼图。

sections_en.text: An online multiplayer jigsaw puzzle game that encourages teamwork within a set time limit.

sections_zh.text: 叙事游戏化与轻量化产品设计：基于卡牌历史人物的策略游戏。

sections_en.text: A Monopoly-inspired territory battle game using poker face cards.

sections_zh.text: 场景化交互学习产品，结合图像识别技术的双语学习工具。

sections_en.text: A bilingual learning tool developed with image recognition technology.

sections_zh.text: 人们不断向自然索取，使得代表自然的大树变得不堪重负。该项目在柏林展出。

sections_en.text: Humanity constantly takes from nature, burdening the tree that represents nature. Exhibited in Berlin.

sections_zh.text: 涵盖政治、文艺、学术、娱乐等各界代表，如：陈元、叶锦添、于和伟、谭松韵、马伯庸、邓紫棋等。

sections_en.text: Featuring representatives from politics, arts, academia, entertainment including Tim Yip, Yu Hewei, Ma Boyong, G.E.M. Tang and others.

sections_zh.text: 多模态AIGC短视频生成管线：综合运用Suno、PixVerse等模型，完成端到端科幻短片创作。

sections_en.text: Multimodal AIGC Short Video Generation Pipeline using Suno and PixVerse for end-to-end sci-fi short film creation.

projects.title_en: AI Visual Design: 50 Days of Making

sections_zh.text: 连续50天，使用AI绘图工具，以全新视角创作戏剧和影视中的经典人物造型。

sections_en.text: 50 consecutive days of using AI drawing tools to reimagine classic character designs from theater, film, and television.
